title: pelargonium × epiphanon
intro: Pelargonium × epiphanon, also known as Mountain Rose or Cape Rose, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium fulgidum. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × epiphanon include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
